ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_title" TEXT /* Title of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the survey (active, inactive) */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., employee satisfaction, customer feedback) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the survey (e.g., all employees, specific departments) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey should start */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey should end */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the survey */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last date the survey was modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the survey */,
  "is_longitudinal" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the survey is part of a longitudinal study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being responded to */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was submitted */,
  "survey_question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey question being responded to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the open-ended response */,
  "response_numeric" REAL /* Numeric value of the response */,
  "response_datetime" TEXT /* Exact date and time of the response */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the respondent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the respondent */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the respondent belongs */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the respondent (e.g., employee, customer) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the respondent (e.g., years of service for employees) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the respondent (e.g., city, country) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the respondent's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey to which the question belongs */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, Likert scale) */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the question is mandatory */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for multiple-choice questions (as a JSON array) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_responses" (
  "question_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question response */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response being referenced */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "response_value" TEXT /* Value of the response (e.g., agree, disagree) */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the response (e.g., comments, notes) */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the response (e.g., text, numeric, date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES survey_questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_responses_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department (e.g., city, country) */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the department head */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the department information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (as a JSON object) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey this record relates to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score derived from responses */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend observed in the survey results (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "segmentation" TEXT /* Demographic segmentation (as a JSON object) */,
  "year_over_year_change" REAL /* Year-over-year change in the survey results */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analytics (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_dates" (
  "response_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response date record */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response this record relates to */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was submitted */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Exact time of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the platform */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Last date the user changed their password */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is an administrator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, submit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of the action in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
